title: MusicPlan
description: Human-edited music review overrides: loop selections per source track and per-shot ducking/continuity adjustments. Written during the music_review checkpoint (after Stage 10[4]). Controls both loop playback and per-shot audio mix parameters.

loop_selections.description: Keyed by source track stem (e.g. 'djokovic_bg_climax'). Each entry defines which segment of the source track to use as the loop base.

start_sec.description: Start position in the source track (seconds)

duration_sec.description: Loop segment duration (seconds). Recommended: 20-35s for seamless looping.

mode.description: loop = concatenate N copies for seamless playback; one_shot = play once then silence

crossfade_ms.description: Crossfade duration at each loop join boundary (milliseconds)

track_volumes.description: Per-track volume offset in dB added to BASE_MUSIC_DB (-6 dB). Key = music_asset_id stem (e.g. 'djokovic_bg_calm'). Value = dB offset (e.g. -6 makes the track play at -12 dB un-ducked). Only applies to shots where that stem was explicitly assigned as music_asset_id.

clip_volumes.description: Per-clip volume offset in dB added to BASE_MUSIC_DB (-6 dB). Value = negative dB offset (e.g. -6 → plays at -12 dB un-ducked). Two key types: (1) manifest item_id (e.g. 'music-s01e01_sh01') for auto-generated clips — applied directly, no shot_override needed; (2) clip_id string (e.g. 'djokovic_bg_calm:19.4s-40.3s') for user-cut clips — persisted immediately, resolved to item_id via shot_overrides[].music_clip_id at apply time.

shot_overrides.description: Per-shot overrides for ducking, continuity, and track assignment. Only include shots that need changes — omitted shots keep their original values.

music_asset_id.description: Override the music asset used for this shot. Can be an existing clip item_id (e.g. 'music-s01e01_sh01') OR a source track stem (e.g. 'djokovic_bg_climax') — when a source stem is used, apply_music_plan will extract a new clip from that source track.

start_sec.description: Override music start offset within the shot (seconds)

duck_db.description: Override ducking attenuation in dB during VO (e.g. -8 for moderate, -6 for light). Relative to base -6 dB.

fade_sec.description: Override duck ramp duration (seconds). 0.15 = standard, 0.8-1.5 = cinematic.

music_clip_id.description: Display label for the selected clip (e.g. 'djokovic_bg_calm:19.4s-40.3s'). Used by the UI to restore dropdown selection.

clip_start_sec.description: When using a source stem as music_asset_id, start position within the source track to extract the clip from (seconds)

clip_duration_sec.description: When using a source stem as music_asset_id, duration of the clip to extract from the source track (seconds)

crossfade_sec.description: Crossfade duration at shot boundaries when music changes (seconds)

base_db.description: Absolute un-ducked music level in dB for this shot (e.g. -12.0). Written by apply_music_plan.py when a clip_volumes offset is resolved; overrides BASE_MUSIC_DB for this shot only.
